what_this_is: SELF-AUTHORED correctness harness for the router — NOT an agent evaluation. Establishes branch correctness + a soundness regression, not real-world efficacy (see module docstring).
audit_collapse_note: collapse% = 1 - |cone|/total is a property of the workbook+edit, NOT the tool; it scales with untouched row count and CRATERS to ~0% on shared-upstream edits (the financial-model case). Reported only for the value-fill cases, pure-rename (tautological 100%) excluded.
